findings.title: Hardcoded internal API key and debug access code
findings.description: Hardcoded internalAPIKey and debugAccessCode constants used for privileged authentication bypass

findings.title: MD5 used for password hashing
findings.description: Passwords hashed with crypto/md5 which is cryptographically broken for password storage

findings.title: No rate limiting on login endpoint
findings.description: Login endpoint accepts unlimited authentication attempts without rate limiting or account lockout

findings.title: Hardcoded debug access code bypasses token verification
findings.description: Token verification endpoint accepts hardcoded debugAccessCode as valid authentication

findings.title: Debug endpoint exposes active session tokens
findings.description: Debug sessions endpoint returns all active session tokens allowing session hijacking
